name: Apple Inc.
summary: Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones (iPhone), personal computers (Mac), tablets (iPad), wearables (Apple Watch, AirPods, Apple Vision Pro), and accessories. The company also offers a broad range of services including the App Store, Apple Music, Apple TV+, Apple Arcade, Apple Fitness+, Apple News+, Apple Pay, Apple Card, AppleCare, iCloud, and advertising platforms. Products are sold through retail stores, online channels, and indirect partners like cellular carriers.

products.name: iPhone
products.description: Line of smartphones based on iOS, including iPhone 17 Pro, iPhone Air, iPhone 17, iPhone 16, and iPhone 16e.

products.name: Mac
products.description: Line of personal computers based on macOS, including MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, iMac, Mac mini, Mac Studio, and Mac Pro.

products.name: iPad
products.description: Line of multipurpose tablets based on iPadOS, including iPad Pro, iPad Air, iPad, and iPad mini.

products.name: Apple Watch
products.description: Line of smartwatches based on watchOS, including Apple Watch Series 11, Apple Watch SE 3, and Apple Watch Ultra 3.

products.name: AirPods
products.description: Line of wireless headphones including AirPods, AirPods Pro, AirPods Max, and Beats products.

products.name: Apple Vision Pro
products.description: Spatial computer based on the visionOS operating system.

products.name: Apple TV 4K
products.description: Media streaming and gaming device based on tvOS operating system.

products.name: HomePod
products.description: High-fidelity wireless smart speakers including HomePod and HomePod mini.

products.name: App Store
products.description: Platform allowing customers to discover and download applications and digital content.

products.name: Apple Music
products.description: Subscription-based curated listening experience with on-demand radio stations.

products.name: Apple TV+
products.description: Subscription service offering exclusive original content and live sports.

products.name: AppleCare
products.description: Fee-based service and support products offering technical support, repair, and accidental damage coverage.

products.name: iCloud
products.description: Cloud services that store and sync customer content across Apple devices and Windows PCs.

partnerships.description: Indirect distribution channel for the sale of Apple products and certain services.
Indirect distribution channel used alongside direct retail and online stores.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
